visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A male host with short dark hair, wearing a dark blue long-sleeved shirt, stands in a brightly lit studio with a purple-toned background. He holds a light green smartphone, showcasing its sleek matte back and prominent triple-camera module. (2) The scene shifts to three smartphones—pink, black, and light green—laid out on a white table. The lighting is soft and professional, highlighting the various metallic textures and colors of the phone's bodies. (3) A close-up view focuses on the pink smartphone's camera lens, revealing a small 'A' logo indicating AI features. The camera housing has a high-quality glass finish with metal accents. (4) The screen displays a woman in a beige sweater running through a park at night, demonstrating camera stabilization. White UI overlays show tracking boxes and recording status. (5) A split-screen comparison shows a woman's profile during a video call, demonstrating AI noise reduction. One side shows 'Off' and the other 'On', with textual explanations visible. (6) A finger interacts with the screen, using an AI tool to erase an unwanted object from a photo of a teddy bear. A white sparkling animation indicates the AI processing. (7) A car drives past on a city street at night, with the phone's UI showing shutter speed and tracking boxes to demo action photography. (8) The host returns to the frame, holding the phone horizontally to show its thin-bezel screen. He scrolls through the home screen, displaying various app icons and a vibrant green wallpaper. (9) Finally, the host rotates the phone to show the rear design again before the video concludes with the three phones displayed together on the table under studio lighting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: CP值之王 Zenfone. [Slogan]: 帶著AI回來啦!. [Logo]: f 3c有意思tim哥 @3ctim. (2) [Subtitle]: Zenfone 12 Ultra 大改形象. (3) [Subtitle]: 外觀三色. [Slogan]: 冷衫綠 櫻花白 檀木黑. (4) [Slogan]: 鏡頭部分滿滿AI蹤跡. [Subtitle]: 六軸防手震雲台4.0. (5) [Slogan]: 防手震提升了66%. [Subtitle]: 搭上AI追焦錄影. (6) [Subtitle]: 人像錄影2.0可以4K. [Slogan]: 還可以開啟光斑特效. (7) [Variety]: AI錄影降噪. (8) [Subtitle]: 智慧消除 模糊修復. (9) [Slogan]: 即時通話口譯 錄音筆記 文章摘要. (10) [Slogan]: 畫圈搜尋 想到都做到. (11) [Slogan]: Snapdragon 8 Elite 16GB 5500mAh 65W快充 eSIM.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male host (Tim哥) in studio; 1 female model in park demo; 1 female model in noise reduction demo.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged Asian male host (Tim哥) with short black hair, wearing a navy blue long-sleeved shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A professional studio with purple vertical-striped curtains and warm ambient lighting; a city park at night with illuminated trees; a night-time urban street with moving traffic.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy electronic pop music featuring a steady driving beat and bright synth pads. A male narrator delivers enthusiastic greetings with high pitch variability and a fast speech rate, typical of tech unboxing reviews. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' transition sound occurs at 0:03, marking the introduction of the phone's name and color options. The BGM maintains its tempo while the narrator's voice remains dominant and clear. (3) At 0:14, a digital 'click' sound effect coincides with the start of the camera stabilization demo. Faint nighttime city ambiance is audible beneath the narrator's professional voice-over explaining technical specs. (4) Multiple UI 'pop' and 'bubble' SFX trigger during the photo editing and search tool demonstrations between 0:28 and 0:42. These sounds are crisp and placed prominently in the mix to emphasize feature usage. (5) The final phase features the narrator summarizing the hardware specifications with a slightly lower vocal arousal but maintained speed. The music swells slightly in volume during the last 3 seconds before a clean hard cut finish.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Showcase -> Technical Specs -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and review the new ASUS Zenfone 12 Ultra, highlighting its advanced AI-driven features in camera, noise reduction, and productivity tools to tech-savvy consumers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The host explicitly demonstrates the product features and lists specific technical specifications, indicating a formal review or promotion.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-frequency text overlays and sound effects characteristic of modern social media tech reviews to maintain viewer engagement during feature demos.
